channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Neighbour at number 10 persistently double parking, 5th March
item.description:
Neighbour at number 10 consistently double parks their car overnight instead of finding alternative parking elsewhere. This is extremely dangerous and is technically illegal. It happens on a weekly basis.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clyde Road, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
CW063 noted as not working at 06:15am

item.title: Moped/ quad bike in canal causing oil spill, 5th March
item.description:
The moped/quadbike is causing oil to spill in the canal which the ducks are swimming in and will ultimately kill fish too if not delt with

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bentham Road, Thamesmead, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish bags, 5th March

Some one has dumped there house hold rubbish on pavement and foxes have rip bags open and now all the stuff in bags is all over the path wich people got to walk

item.title: Main Entrance Door Not Locking, 5th March
item.description:
The main entrance door is unlocked from past two weeks and it's locking system is not working. It need to be fixed as this area is affected by trespassers
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haymerle Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working for 3mths, 5th March
item.description:
This street lamp is not working again. It was repaired last year and required an on-site visit, so it does not appear to be something that can be fixed remotely. The lamp is located just before the flyover in an area where there have been numerous accidents, making this a serious safety concern. Vans are often parked directly underneath the light and, when it is not working, vehicles have previously collided with them due to poor visibility. Please ensure this issue is properly investigated and repaired on site. The report should not be marked as “fixed” until the light is actually functioning. Marking the issue as “fixed pending resolution” does not accurately reflect the situation.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Arbuthnot Lane, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Asbestos on sidewalk, 5th March
item.description:
Asbestos roofing on footpath

item.title: Abandanned bicycle for many months., 4th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Harben Parade, South Hampstead, Greater London
